CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str1 String, str2 String);
SELECT id, stringJaccardIndex(str1, str2) AS jaccard_index FROM test_strings WHERE jaccard_index > 0;
SELECT id, stringJaccardIndex(str1, lower(str2)) AS jaccard_index FROM test_strings WHERE jaccard_index IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_join (item_id UInt32, value String);
SELECT ts.id, stringJaccardIndex(ts.str1, tj.value) AS jaccard_index FROM test_strings ts JOIN test_join tj ON ts.id = tj.item_id;
SELECT ts.id, stringJaccardIndex(ts.str1, tj.value) FROM test_strings ts LEFT JOIN test_join tj ON ts.str1 LIKE '%foo%' OR ts.str1 LIKE '%bar%';
SELECT id, stringJaccardIndex('same', 'same') AS jaccard_index, stringJaccardIndex('', 'nonempty') AS empty_index FROM test_strings WHERE empty_index IS NOT NULL;
SELECT stringJaccardIndex('test', '') AS result_1, stringJaccardIndex('', 'sample') AS result_2, stringJaccardIndex('', '') AS result_3;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings) AS total_records SELECT stringJaccardIndex(str1, str2) / total_records AS normalized_index FROM test_strings;
